summary: A 3-4-2-1 built on 1v1 10s and overlapping wing-backs, excellent at the top end but very open in the press — issues to fix to give a good account.
style: 3-4-2-1 — play to get the wingers (10s) 1v1, overlapping FBs & WBs, crosses into the box, central block structure needed.

counterReliance.note: Get the 10s 1v1 and overlap to cross

strengths: Excellent at the top end of the pitch

keyPlayers.name: Jordan Ayew
keyPlayers.note: Goals, assists and creativity — final pass, good dribbler, great crosser from set-plays

tactics: Get the 10s 1v1 and overlap the wing-backs to cross. They need to tighten the press and central structure to give a great account of an excellent attacking side.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
